steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "General Teams Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" dialog.
Click the "Simple Bot" option in the "Teams Capability" dropdown menu.
Click on the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface at coordinates (288, 101).
Click the "Default folder" field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the path "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects".
@code in file "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/${{var:app_name}}/m365agents.local.yml" replace line 21 name value with more than 120 characters.

Trigger the VS Code command palette by pressing Ctrl+Shift+P in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit workspace, with sidebar sections for Accounts, Environment, Development, Lifecycle, and Utility visible.
Type 'debug: select and start' into the VS Code Command Palette input box at the top center of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press the Enter key to select the "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" command from the VS Code command palette.
Type the text "debug in teams (Chrome)" into the Visual Studio Code command palette input field at the top center of the interface.
Press the Enter key to select "Debug in Teams (Chrome)" from the debug configuration dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
@assertion there's error shows "The maximum length is 120".
